title: hieracium humile subsp. huetii
intro: Hieracium humile subsp. huetii, also known as small hawkweed, is a perennial plant in the dandelion family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Hieracium humile subsp. huetii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support kidney function. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
